## From data to climate-informed species distribution models {background-image="../../shared/assets/images/whale-shark-wide.jpg" background-size="cover" background-position="center" .section-photo .workflow-transition}

<div class="sb5-header">IKI - Save the Blue 5 (SB5)</div>
<div class="workflow-transition-panel">
<h2 class="slide-title">From data to climate-informed species distribution models</h2>

This presentation connects physical ocean projections, biological observations, and first-generation species distribution models into a transparent workflow for expert review.

<div class="pipeline">
<div>Physical ocean data</div>
<div>Biological records</div>
<div>Predictor extraction</div>
<div>First-generation species distribution models</div>
<div>Planning interpretation</div>
</div>

The intended outcome is focused feedback on data gaps, species/model interpretation, and realistic improvements over the next year.
</div>

<div class="sb5-footer">isaaksonbm · ibrito@conservation.org</div>

---

## Workshop inputs already exist {background-color="white" .technical-white}

<div class="sb5-header">IKI - Save the Blue 5 (SB5)</div>
<h2 class="slide-title">Workshop inputs already exist</h2>

<div class="two-col-visual">
<div>

- Taxonomic and data workshop: Panama 2025
- Physical modeling workshop: Toulouse 2025
- Biological data preparation repository
- Ocean downscaling workflow repository
- Two Shiny viewers for review and discussion

</div>
<div>

![](../../shared/assets/images/panama-taxonomic-workshop-2025.jpg)

</div>
</div>

<div class="sb5-footer">isaaksonbm · ibrito@conservation.org</div>
